app_subtitle: Upload your appointments or sales file and find out which customers are at risk of leaving.
upload_help: Must include at least: customer name, date, and (optional) amount for each visit or purchase.
error_no_client_col: We couldn't identify the customer column. Check that your file has a column with customer names or IDs.
error_no_date_col: We couldn't identify the date column. Check that your file has a column with visit or purchase dates.
error_file_read: We couldn't read the file. Make sure it's a valid CSV or Excel file.
error_no_valid_dates: We couldn't read any valid dates in the detected column. Check the date format in your file.
risk_threshold_help: How overdue a customer must be, in multiples of their normal cycle, to be flagged at risk. E.g. 1.5 means 50% later than usual. Raise it to be less strict, lower it to catch risk sooner.
explain_at_risk: Usually comes every {cycle} days. It's been {days_since} days since their last visit on {last_visit} — they were expected back by {expected} ({ratio}x their usual cycle).
explain_on_track: Usually comes every {cycle} days and their last visit was {days_since} days ago — within their normal pattern.
explain_insufficient_data: Not enough visit history yet ({n_visits} visit(s)) to calculate their usual cycle.
action_reminder_description: A short message or call reminding them of their next visit might be enough — they may have simply lost track of the date.
action_discount_description: More time than usual has passed. A personalized message with a small discount or perk could motivate them to come back.
action_outreach_description: The delay is significant — they may already be going elsewhere. A personal outreach with a stronger offer is worth it.
action_disclaimer: This is only a suggestion. You decide whether to approve, edit, or discard each action — the app never contacts the customer on its own.
action_discount_with_value: Offer a {value} discount to encourage them to come back.
no_at_risk_clients: No at-risk customers were detected in this file — nice work!
edit_textarea_label: Final action (you can edit it before exporting)
export_no_data: No at-risk customers to export yet.
feedback_not_useful_help: Mark this suggestion as not useful
message_greeting_formal: Hi {client}, we hope you're doing well. We noticed we haven't seen you in a while and would love to have you back soon. Looking forward to it!
message_greeting_informal: Hey {client}! How have you been? We haven't seen you in a while, we'd love to see you again soon!
message_reminder_formal: Hi {client}, we hope you're doing well. We noticed you usually visit every {cycle} days and it's now been {days_since} — just wanted to remind you we're available whenever you'd like to book your next visit.
message_reminder_informal: Hey {client}! We noticed it's been {days_since} days since your last visit (you usually come every {cycle} days or so) — we'd love to see you soon!
message_discount_formal: Hi {client}, we hope you're doing well. We noticed it's been longer than usual since your last visit ({days_since} days). We'd love to have you back, so we're offering you [discount/perk details] if you book soon.
message_discount_informal: Hey {client}! We already miss you around here. It's been {days_since} days since your last visit, so we wanted to offer you [discount/perk details] if you're up for coming back soon.
message_discount_formal_with_value: Hi {client}, we hope you're doing well. We noticed it's been longer than usual since your last visit ({days_since} days). We'd love to have you back, so we're offering you a {discount_value} discount if you book soon.
message_discount_informal_with_value: Hey {client}! We already miss you around here. It's been {days_since} days since your last visit, so we wanted to offer you a {discount_value} discount if you're up for coming back soon.
message_outreach_formal: Hi {client}, we hope you're doing well. We noticed it's been quite a while since your last visit ({days_since} days) and would like to reach out personally to check in and offer you [special offer details] to welcome you back.
message_outreach_informal: Hey {client}! We miss you around here. It's been quite a while ({days_since} days) since your last visit and we'd love to hear from you — we've got [special offer details] for whenever you're ready to come back.
